widgets_values:
This workflow uses Flux.2 Klein 4B with a reference latent for enhancement, but feel free to use other models, such as SDXL with a controlnet etc.

This workflow requires UVs and a basic texture for use as a starting point. If you are looking to texture a mesh that is untextured, then please refer to the flux_klein_trellis2_retexture workflow.

Feel free to experiment with prompts and tweak the subgraph.

In this example, blur is used before enhancing, in order to remove unwanted noise from the base texture and produce a cleaner look.

Note that ComfyUI native 3D preview often renders normals incorrectly.

If you see hard seams in the preview, it can often look fine and view it in other applications.
In order to reduce noticable seams at the edges of different projections, normal_fade_power and normal_fade_min can be increased.
Enhance and improve the quality of image1, keep the pose, lighting, anatomy, structure and camera position exactly the same as in image1, flat ambient lighting, grey background, back view
